name: Calcolatore Zone Cardiache
desc: Calcola Zone = % Max HR | Zone 1: <60%, Zone 2: 60-70%, Zone 3: 70-80%, Zone 4: 80-90%, Zone 5: >90%. Esempio: Max HR 185 bpm = Z2: 111-130 bpm | Z3: 130-148 bpm |...
